phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach the fountain safely on foot
phrases.text_local: Comment rejoindre la fontaine à pied ?
phrases.pronunciation: koh-MAHN ruh-ZHWEHN-druh lah fon-TEN ah PYAY
phrases.cultural_note: The Fontaine de la Rotonde sits in the middle of a busy roundabout. Use the marked crossings or underground passages to reach it.

responses.english: There's a pedestrian crossing right there.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ah uhn pah-SAHZH pyay-TOHN zhoost LAH
responses.local: Il y a un passage piéton juste là.

phrases.intent_en: Ask to take a photo with the fountain as backdrop
phrases.text_local: Pourriez-vous prendre une photo de moi avec la fontaine ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-RYAY voo PRAHN-druh oon foh-TOH duh mwah ah-VEK lah fon-TEN
phrases.cultural_note: The Fontaine de la Rotonde is the symbolic gateway to the Cours Mirabeau and one of the most photographed landmarks in Aix. Early morning light hits it beautifully before the tour buses arrive.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for directions to the old town from the fountain
phrases.text_local: Comment rejoindre le Vieil Aix depuis la fontaine ?
phrases.pronunciation: koh-MAHN ruh-ZHWEHN-druh luh VYEHY EKS duh-PWEE lah fon-TEN
phrases.cultural_note: From the Rotonde, the old town (Vieil Aix) is just north along the Cours Mirabeau. Turn left into any of the narrow lanes off the north side of the Cours to enter the medieval street network.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the roundabout and traffic
phrases.text_local: C'est difficile de traverser le rond-point pour s'approcher de la fontaine ?
phrases.pronunciation: seh dee-fee-SEEL duh truh-ver-SAY luh rohn-PWAHN poor sah-proh-SHAY duh lah fon-TEN
phrases.cultural_note: The Fontaine de la Rotonde sits in the middle of a busy roundabout. Pedestrians can reach the fountain via underground passages. Do not attempt to cross the traffic lanes — use the marked crossings at the edges.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the nearest café terrace is
phrases.text_local: Où est la terrasse de café la plus proche ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh lah teh-RAHS duh kah-FAY lah ploo PROSH
phrases.cultural_note: The Cours Mirabeau begins just beyond the fountain and is lined with iconic café terraces under the plane trees.

responses.english: On the Cours Mirabeau, just over there.
responses.phonetic: soor luh KOOR mee-rah-BOH, zhoost lah-BAH
responses.local: Sur le Cours Mirabeau, juste là-bas.
